description: The 'Ndrina Cua is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Natile di Careri, Calabria, Italy. It is active in the appropriation of public contracts and international drug trafficking. The group has been involved in large-scale cocaine trafficking from South America to Europe, with operations spanning multiple countries. It has been targeted in major anti-mafia operations such as Minotauro and European 'Ndrangheta connection.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico internazionale di stupefacenti tra Belgio
country_links.context: The organization was involved in international drug trafficking between Belgium and other countries.
The organization routed cocaine through Brazilian ports.
